item.name: BUFFER_EMPTY
item.description: Deserialization buffer was empty when trying to read data

item.name: FORMAT_ERROR
item.description: Deserialization data had incorrect values (unexpected data types)

item.name: SIZE_MISMATCH
item.description: Data was left in in the buffer, but not enough to deserialize

item.name: RECV_NO_DATA
item.description: Receive worked, but there was no data

item.name: RECV_ERROR
item.description: Receive error occurred retrying may succeed

item.name: SEND_ERROR
item.description: Send error occurred retrying may succeed

item.name: FILE_EXISTS
item.description: file already exist (for CREATE with O_EXCL enabled)

item.name: NOT_SUPPORTED
item.description: Kernel or file system does not support operation

item.name: INVALID_MODE
item.description: Mode for file access is invalid for current operation

item.name: OTHER_ERROR
item.description: A catch-all for other errors. Have to look in implementation-specific code

item.name: INVALID_MODE
item.description: Operation not permitted with current configuration

item.name: WARNING_LO
item.description: A less serious but recoverable event

item.name: I2C_OPEN_ERR
item.description: I2C driver failed to open device

command.description: Set the file path for the ML model.
Set the file path for data to be inferenced.
Perform inference on multiple images in the specified path.
Clear the inference path.
Command to set the Jetson power mode
Command to request current power mode
Command to locally request Jetson shutdown
Requested power mode parameter parameter set
Requested power mode parameter parameter save
IDLE Low temperature threshold parameter set
IDLE Low temperature threshold parameter save
IDLE High temperature threshold parameter set
IDLE High temperature threshold parameter save
WARNING Low temperature threshold parameter set
WARNING Low temperature threshold parameter save
WARNING High temperature threshold parameter set
WARNING High temperature threshold parameter save
FAULT Low temperature threshold parameter set
FAULT Low temperature threshold parameter save
FAULT High temperature threshold parameter set
FAULT High temperature threshold parameter save
No-op command
No-op string command
No-op command
Clear command tracking info to recover from components not returning status
Run a command sequence file

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: block
arg.description: Return command status when complete or not

command.description: Validate a command sequence file

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

command.description: Cancel a command sequence
Start running a command sequence
Perform one step in a command sequence. Valid only if CmdSequencer is in MANUAL run mode.
Set the run mode to AUTO.
Set the run mode to MANUAL.
Wait for sequences that are running to finish. Allow user to run multiple seq files in SEQ_NO_BLOCK mode then wait for them to finish before allowing more seq run request.
Read a named file off the disk. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

command.description: Cancel the downlink in progress, if any
Read a named file off the disk from a starting position. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

arg.name: startOffset
arg.description: Starting offset of the source file

arg.name: length
arg.description: Number of bytes to send from starting offset. Length of 0 implies until the end of the file

command.description: Create a directory
Move a file
Remove a directory, which must be empty
Remove a file
Perform a Linux shell command and write the output to a log file.

arg.name: logFileName
arg.description: The name of the log file

command.description: Append 1 file's contents to the end of another.

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file to take content from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The file to get the size of

command.description: Set filter for reporting events. Events are not stored in component.
Filter a particular ID
Dump the filter states via events
Command to save parameter image to file. Uses file name passed to constructor
A command to enable or disable health checks

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not health checks are enabled

command.description: Ignore a particular ping entry

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not a port is pinged

command.description: Change ping value
A command to enable or disable system resource telemetry

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not system resource telemetry is enabled

command.description: No-op command
No-op string command
No-op command
Clear command tracking info to recover from components not returning status
Run a command sequence file

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: block
arg.description: Return command status when complete or not

command.description: Validate a command sequence file

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

command.description: Cancel a command sequence
Start running a command sequence
Perform one step in a command sequence. Valid only if CmdSequencer is in MANUAL run mode.
Set the run mode to AUTO.
Set the run mode to MANUAL.
Wait for sequences that are running to finish. Allow user to run multiple seq files in SEQ_NO_BLOCK mode then wait for them to finish before allowing more seq run request.
Read a named file off the disk. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

command.description: Cancel the downlink in progress, if any
Read a named file off the disk from a starting position. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

arg.name: startOffset
arg.description: Starting offset of the source file

arg.name: length
arg.description: Number of bytes to send from starting offset. Length of 0 implies until the end of the file

command.description: Create a directory
Move a file
Remove a directory, which must be empty
Remove a file
Perform a Linux shell command and write the output to a log file.

arg.name: logFileName
arg.description: The name of the log file

command.description: Append 1 file's contents to the end of another.

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file to take content from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The file to get the size of

command.description: Set filter for reporting events. Events are not stored in component.
Filter a particular ID
Dump the filter states via events
Command to save parameter image to file. Uses file name passed to constructor
A command to enable or disable health checks

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not health checks are enabled

command.description: Ignore a particular ping entry

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not a port is pinged

command.description: Change ping value
A command to enable or disable system resource telemetry

arg.name: enable
arg.description: whether or not system resource telemetry is enabled

command.description: IMX_CPU_IDLE_LOW Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_IDLE_LOW Parameter parameter save
IMX_CPU_IDLE_HIGH Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_IDLE_HIGH Parameter parameter save
IMX_CPU_WARN_LOW Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_WARN_LOW Parameter parameter save
IMX_CPU_WARN_HIGH Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_WARN_HIGH Parameter parameter save
IMX_CPU_FAULT_LOW Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_FAULT_LOW Parameter parameter save
IMX_CPU_FAULT_HIGH Parameter parameter set
IMX_CPU_FAULT_HIGH Parameter parameter save
IDLE Low temperature threshold parameter set
IDLE Low temperature threshold parameter save
IDLE High temperature threshold parameter set
IDLE High temperature threshold parameter save
WARNING Low temperature threshold parameter set
WARNING Low temperature threshold parameter save
WARNING High temperature threshold parameter set
WARNING High temperature threshold parameter save
FAULT Low temperature threshold parameter set
FAULT Low temperature threshold parameter save
FAULT High temperature threshold parameter set
FAULT High temperature threshold parameter save
command to set the state of the gpio Sets the state of the GPIO to high
Parameter to set the time to wait before re-powering on the board parameter set
Parameter to set the time to wait before re-powering on the board parameter save
Command to request a power mode change on the Jetson
Command to request a power state change (on/off) for the Jetson

event.name: FileSendError
event.format_string: Error sending DP file %s, stat %s. Halting xmit.

event.name: MLSet
event.description: Event to output ML path set.

event.name: InferenceSet
event.description: Event to output inference path set.

event.name: InferenceOutput
event.description: Event to output inference results.

event.name: WatchdogState
event.description: event that updates everytime watchdog is pet

event.name: POWER_MODE_CHANGED
event.description: Event indicating power mode change successful

event.name: POWER_MODE_CHANGE_FAILED
event.description: Event indicating power mode change failed
event.format_string: Failed to change Jetson power mode to %s: %s

event.name: POWER_MODE_REQUEST_RECEIVED
event.description: Event emitted when a power mode change request arrives via the hub port (from IMX PowerManager)
event.format_string: Jetson received power mode change request: %s

event.name: JETSON_POWER_STATE_REQUEST_RECEIVED
event.description: Event emitted when a Jetson power state change request arrives via the hub port (from IMX PowerManager)
event.format_string: Jetson received power state change request: %s

event.name: JETSON_SHUTDOWN_STARTED
event.description: Event indicating Jetson is beginning shutdown
event.format_string: Jetson shutdown initiated due to power state change request: %s

event.name: JETSON_POWER_STATE_CHANGE_FAILED
event.description: Event indicating Jetson power state request failed
event.format_string: Jetson power state change request %s failed: %s

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

arg.name: slot
arg.description: The dispatch slot it was placed in

event.name: OpCodeDispatched
event.description: Op code dispatched event

event.name: OpCodeCompleted
event.description: Op code completed event

event.name: OpCodeError
event.description: Op code completed with error event

event.name: MalformedCommand
event.description: Received a malformed command packet

event.name: InvalidCommand
event.description: Received an invalid opcode

event.name: TooManyCommands
event.description: Exceeded the number of commands that can be simultaneously executed

arg.name: Opcode
arg.description: The opcode that overflowed the list

event.name: NoOpReceived
event.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command

event.name: NoOpStringReceived
event.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command from GUI with a string

arg.name: message
arg.description: The NO-OP string that is generated

event.name: TestCmd1Args
event.description: This log event message returns the TEST_CMD_1 arguments.

event.name: OpCodeReregistered
event.description: Op code reregistered event
event.format_string: Opcode 0x%x is already registered to port %d

event.name: CS_SequenceLoaded
event.description: Sequence file was successfully loaded.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_SequenceCanceled
event.description: A command sequence was successfully canceled.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileReadError
event.description: The Sequence File Loader could not read the sequence file.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileInvalid
event.description: The sequence file format was invalid.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_RecordInvalid
event.description: The format of a command record was invalid.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileSizeError
event.description: The sequence file was too large.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileNotFound
event.description: The sequence file was not found

event.name: CS_FileCrcFailure
event.description: The sequence file validation failed
event.format_string: Sequence file %s had invalid CRC. Stored 0x%x, Computed 0x%x.

arg.name: storedCRC
arg.description: The CRC stored in the file

arg.name: computedCRC
arg.description: The CRC computed over the file

event.name: CS_CommandComplete
event.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received a success status in return.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: recordNumber
arg.description: The record number of the command

event.name: CS_SequenceComplete
event.description: A command sequence successfully completed.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_CommandError
event.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received an error status in return.
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Command %u (opcode %u) completed with error %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_InvalidMode
event.description: The Command Sequencer received a command that was invalid for its current mode.

event.name: CS_RecordMismatch
event.description: Number of records in header doesn't match number in file
event.format_string: Sequence file %s header records mismatch: %u in header, found %u extra bytes.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: header_records
arg.description: The number of records in the header

arg.name: extra_bytes
arg.description: The number of bytes beyond last record

event.name: CS_TimeBaseMismatch
event.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Current time base doesn't match sequence time: base: %u seq: %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_TimeContextMismatch
event.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Current time context doesn't match sequence context: base: %u seq: %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_PortSequenceStarted
event.description: A local port request to run a sequence was started

event.name: CS_UnexpectedCompletion
event.description: A command status came back when no sequence was running
event.format_string: Command complete status received while no sequences active. Opcode: %u

event.name: CS_ModeSwitched
event.description: Switched step mode

event.name: CS_NoSequenceActive
event.description: A sequence related command came with no active sequence

event.name: CS_SequenceValid
event.description: A sequence passed validation

event.name: CS_SequenceTimeout
event.description: A sequence passed validation

event.name: CS_CmdStepped
event.description: A command in a sequence was stepped through

event.name: CS_CmdStarted
event.description: A manual sequence was started

event.name: CS_JoinWaiting
event.description: Wait for the current running sequence file complete
event.format_string: Start waiting for sequence file %s: Command %u (opcode %u) to complete

event.name: CS_JoinWaitingNotComplete
event.description: Cannot run new sequence when current sequence file is still running.
event.format_string: Still waiting for sequence file to complete

event.name: CS_NoRecords
event.format_string: Sequence file %s has no records. Ignoring.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: QueueOverflow
event.description: Queue overflow event

event.name: FileOpenError
event.description: An error occurred opening a file

event.name: FileReadError
event.description: An error occurred reading a file
event.format_string: Could not read file %s with status %d

event.name: FileSent
event.description: The File Downlink component successfully sent a file

event.name: DownlinkCanceled
event.description: The File Downlink component canceled downlink of a file
event.format_string: Canceled downlink of file %s to file %s

event.name: DownlinkTimeout
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Timeout occurred during downlink of file %s to file %s. Downlink has been canceled.

event.name: DownlinkPartialWarning
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Offset %u plus length %u is greater than source size %u for partial downlink of file %s to file %s.

event.name: DownlinkPartialFail
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Error occurred during partial downlink of file %s to file %s. Offset %u greater than or equal to source filesize %u.

event.name: SendDataFail
event.description: The File Downlink component generated an error when trying to send a data packet.
event.format_string: Failed to send data packet from file %s at byte offset %u.

event.name: SendStarted
event.description: The File Downlink component started a file download.
event.format_string: Downlink of %u bytes started from %s to %s

event.name: DirectoryCreateError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to create a directory
event.format_string: Could not create directory %s, returned status %u

event.name: DirectoryRemoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a directory
event.format_string: Could not remove directory %s, returned status %u

event.name: FileMoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to move a file
event.format_string: Could not move file %s to file %s, returned status %u

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: FileRemoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a file
event.format_string: Could not remove file %s, returned status %u

event.name: ShellCommandFailed
event.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status non-zero

event.name: AppendFileFailed
event.description: The File System component returned status non-zero when trying to append 2 files together

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: AppendFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: ShellCommandSucceeded
event.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status zero

event.name: CreateDirectorySucceeded
event.description: The File System component created a new directory without error

event.name: RemoveDirectorySucceeded
event.description: The File System component deleted and existing directory without error

event.name: MoveFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component moved a file to a new location without error

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: RemoveFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component deleted an existing file without error

event.name: AppendFileStarted
event.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error
event.format_string: Appending file %s to the end of %s...

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: ShellCommandStarted
event.description: The File System component began executing a shell command

event.name: CreateDirectoryStarted
event.description: The File System component began creating a new directory

event.name: RemoveDirectoryStarted
event.description: The File System component began deleting a directory

event.name: MoveFileStarted
event.description: The File System component began moving a file to a new location

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: RemoveFileStarted
event.description: The File System component began deleting an existing file

event.name: FileSizeSucceeded
event.description: File size response
event.format_string: The size of file %s is %lu B

arg.name: size
arg.description: The size of the file in bytes

event.name: FileSizeError
event.description: Failed to get file size
event.format_string: Failed to get the size of file %s, returned status %u

event.name: FileSizeStarted
event.description: Checking file size

event.name: BadChecksum
event.description: During receipt of a file, the computed checksum value did not match the stored value
event.format_string: Bad checksum value during receipt of file %s: computed 0x%x, read 0x%x

event.name: FileOpenError
event.description: An error occurred opening a file

event.name: FileReceived
event.description: The File Uplink component successfully received a file

event.name: FileWriteError
event.description: An error occurred writing to a file

event.name: InvalidReceiveMode
event.description: The File Uplink component received a packet with a type that was invalid for the current receive mode

arg.name: packetType
arg.description: The type of the packet received

event.name: PacketOutOfBounds
event.description: During receipt of a file, the File Uplink component encountered a packet with offset and size out of bounds for the current file
event.format_string: Packet %u out of bounds for file %s

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the packet

event.name: PacketOutOfOrder
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered an out-of-order packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

arg.name: lastPacketIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the last packet received before the out-of-order packet

event.name: PacketDuplicate
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered a duplicate packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the duplicate packet

event.name: UplinkCanceled
event.description: The File Uplink component received a CANCEL packet

event.name: DecodeError
event.description: Error decoding file packet
event.format_string: Unable to decode file packet. Status: %d

arg.name: status
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

event.name: SEVERITY_FILTER_STATE
event.description: Dump severity filter state

event.name: ID_FILTER_ENABLED
event.description: Indicate ID is filtered

event.name: ID_FILTER_LIST_FULL
event.description: Attempted to add ID to full ID filter ID
event.format_string: ID filter list is full. Cannot filter %u .

event.name: ID_FILTER_REMOVED
event.description: Removed an ID from the filter

event.name: ID_FILTER_NOT_FOUND
event.description: ID not in filter

event.name: PrmIdNotFound
event.description: Parameter ID not found in database.

event.name: PrmIdUpdated
event.description: Parameter ID updated in database

event.name: PrmDbFull
event.description: Parameter database is full
event.format_string: Parameter DB full when adding ID 0x%x

event.name: PrmIdAdded
event.description: Parameter ID added to database

event.name: PrmFileWriteError
event.description: Failed to write parameter file
event.format_string: Parameter write failed in stage %s with record %d and error %d

arg.name: record
arg.description: The record that had the failure

event.name: PrmFileSaveComplete
event.description: Save of parameter file completed
event.format_string: Parameter file save completed. Wrote %u records.

event.name: PrmFileReadError
event.description: Failed to read parameter file
event.format_string: Parameter file read failed in stage %s with record %d and error %d

arg.name: record
arg.description: The record that had the failure

event.name: PrmFileLoadComplete
event.description: Load of parameter file completed
event.format_string: Parameter file load completed. Read %u records.

event.name: HLTH_PING_WARN
event.description: Warn that a ping target is longer than the warning value

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_LATE
event.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_WRONG_KEY
event.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding
event.format_string: Ping entry %s responded with wrong key 0x%x

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_ENABLE
event.description: Report checking turned on or off

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_PING
event.description: Report a particular entry on or off

arg.name: enabled
arg.description: If health pinging is enabled for a particular entry

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_LOOKUP_ERROR
event.description: Entry was not found

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_UPDATED
event.description: Report changed ping
event.format_string: Health ping for %s changed to WARN %u FATAL %u

event.name: HLTH_PING_INVALID_VALUES
event.description: Report changed ping
event.format_string: Health ping for %s invalid values: WARN %u FATAL %u

event.name: AF_ASSERT_0
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_1
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_2
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_3
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_4
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_5
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_6
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_UNEXPECTED_ASSERT
event.description: An unexpected assert happened
event.format_string: Unexpected assert in file %s, line %u, args %u

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: NoBuffsAvailable
event.description: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

event.name: NullEmptyBuffer
event.description: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation
event.format_string: Received null pointer and zero size buffer

event.name: QueueOverflow
event.description: Queue overflow event

event.name: OpenPinError
event.format_string: Failed to open GPIO chip %s pin %u [%s]: %s

event.name: InterruptReadError
event.format_string: Interrupt data read expected %u byes and got %u

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

event.name: RateGroupStarted
event.description: Informational event that rate group has started

event.name: RateGroupCycleSlip
event.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip
event.format_string: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle %u

arg.name: cycle
arg.description: The cycle where the cycle occurred

arg.name: slot
arg.description: The dispatch slot it was placed in

event.name: OpCodeDispatched
event.description: Op code dispatched event

event.name: OpCodeCompleted
event.description: Op code completed event

event.name: OpCodeError
event.description: Op code completed with error event

event.name: MalformedCommand
event.description: Received a malformed command packet

event.name: InvalidCommand
event.description: Received an invalid opcode

event.name: TooManyCommands
event.description: Exceeded the number of commands that can be simultaneously executed

arg.name: Opcode
arg.description: The opcode that overflowed the list

event.name: NoOpReceived
event.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command

event.name: NoOpStringReceived
event.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command from GUI with a string

arg.name: message
arg.description: The NO-OP string that is generated

event.name: TestCmd1Args
event.description: This log event message returns the TEST_CMD_1 arguments.

event.name: OpCodeReregistered
event.description: Op code reregistered event
event.format_string: Opcode 0x%x is already registered to port %d

event.name: CS_SequenceLoaded
event.description: Sequence file was successfully loaded.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_SequenceCanceled
event.description: A command sequence was successfully canceled.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileReadError
event.description: The Sequence File Loader could not read the sequence file.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileInvalid
event.description: The sequence file format was invalid.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_RecordInvalid
event.description: The format of a command record was invalid.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileSizeError
event.description: The sequence file was too large.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_FileNotFound
event.description: The sequence file was not found

event.name: CS_FileCrcFailure
event.description: The sequence file validation failed
event.format_string: Sequence file %s had invalid CRC. Stored 0x%x, Computed 0x%x.

arg.name: storedCRC
arg.description: The CRC stored in the file

arg.name: computedCRC
arg.description: The CRC computed over the file

event.name: CS_CommandComplete
event.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received a success status in return.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: recordNumber
arg.description: The record number of the command

event.name: CS_SequenceComplete
event.description: A command sequence successfully completed.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_CommandError
event.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received an error status in return.
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Command %u (opcode %u) completed with error %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_InvalidMode
event.description: The Command Sequencer received a command that was invalid for its current mode.

event.name: CS_RecordMismatch
event.description: Number of records in header doesn't match number in file
event.format_string: Sequence file %s header records mismatch: %u in header, found %u extra bytes.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

arg.name: header_records
arg.description: The number of records in the header

arg.name: extra_bytes
arg.description: The number of bytes beyond last record

event.name: CS_TimeBaseMismatch
event.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Current time base doesn't match sequence time: base: %u seq: %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_TimeContextMismatch
event.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files
event.format_string: Sequence file %s: Current time context doesn't match sequence context: base: %u seq: %u

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: CS_PortSequenceStarted
event.description: A local port request to run a sequence was started

event.name: CS_UnexpectedCompletion
event.description: A command status came back when no sequence was running
event.format_string: Command complete status received while no sequences active. Opcode: %u

event.name: CS_ModeSwitched
event.description: Switched step mode

event.name: CS_NoSequenceActive
event.description: A sequence related command came with no active sequence

event.name: CS_SequenceValid
event.description: A sequence passed validation

event.name: CS_SequenceTimeout
event.description: A sequence passed validation

event.name: CS_CmdStepped
event.description: A command in a sequence was stepped through

event.name: CS_CmdStarted
event.description: A manual sequence was started

event.name: CS_JoinWaiting
event.description: Wait for the current running sequence file complete
event.format_string: Start waiting for sequence file %s: Command %u (opcode %u) to complete

event.name: CS_JoinWaitingNotComplete
event.description: Cannot run new sequence when current sequence file is still running.
event.format_string: Still waiting for sequence file to complete

event.name: CS_NoRecords
event.format_string: Sequence file %s has no records. Ignoring.

arg.name: fileName
arg.description: The name of the sequence file

event.name: QueueOverflow
event.description: Queue overflow event

event.name: FileOpenError
event.description: An error occurred opening a file

event.name: FileReadError
event.description: An error occurred reading a file
event.format_string: Could not read file %s with status %d

event.name: FileSent
event.description: The File Downlink component successfully sent a file

event.name: DownlinkCanceled
event.description: The File Downlink component canceled downlink of a file
event.format_string: Canceled downlink of file %s to file %s

event.name: DownlinkTimeout
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Timeout occurred during downlink of file %s to file %s. Downlink has been canceled.

event.name: DownlinkPartialWarning
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Offset %u plus length %u is greater than source size %u for partial downlink of file %s to file %s.

event.name: DownlinkPartialFail
event.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.
event.format_string: Error occurred during partial downlink of file %s to file %s. Offset %u greater than or equal to source filesize %u.

event.name: SendDataFail
event.description: The File Downlink component generated an error when trying to send a data packet.
event.format_string: Failed to send data packet from file %s at byte offset %u.

event.name: SendStarted
event.description: The File Downlink component started a file download.
event.format_string: Downlink of %u bytes started from %s to %s

event.name: DirectoryCreateError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to create a directory
event.format_string: Could not create directory %s, returned status %u

event.name: DirectoryRemoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a directory
event.format_string: Could not remove directory %s, returned status %u

event.name: FileMoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to move a file
event.format_string: Could not move file %s to file %s, returned status %u

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: FileRemoveError
event.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a file
event.format_string: Could not remove file %s, returned status %u

event.name: ShellCommandFailed
event.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status non-zero

event.name: AppendFileFailed
event.description: The File System component returned status non-zero when trying to append 2 files together

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: AppendFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: ShellCommandSucceeded
event.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status zero

event.name: CreateDirectorySucceeded
event.description: The File System component created a new directory without error

event.name: RemoveDirectorySucceeded
event.description: The File System component deleted and existing directory without error

event.name: MoveFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component moved a file to a new location without error

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: RemoveFileSucceeded
event.description: The File System component deleted an existing file without error

event.name: AppendFileStarted
event.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error
event.format_string: Appending file %s to the end of %s...

arg.name: source
arg.description: The name of the file being read from

arg.name: target
arg.description: The name of the file to append to

event.name: ShellCommandStarted
event.description: The File System component began executing a shell command

event.name: CreateDirectoryStarted
event.description: The File System component began creating a new directory

event.name: RemoveDirectoryStarted
event.description: The File System component began deleting a directory

event.name: MoveFileStarted
event.description: The File System component began moving a file to a new location

arg.name: sourceFileName
arg.description: The name of the source file

arg.name: destFileName
arg.description: The name of the destination file

event.name: RemoveFileStarted
event.description: The File System component began deleting an existing file

event.name: FileSizeSucceeded
event.description: File size response
event.format_string: The size of file %s is %lu B

arg.name: size
arg.description: The size of the file in bytes

event.name: FileSizeError
event.description: Failed to get file size
event.format_string: Failed to get the size of file %s, returned status %u

event.name: FileSizeStarted
event.description: Checking file size

event.name: BadChecksum
event.description: During receipt of a file, the computed checksum value did not match the stored value
event.format_string: Bad checksum value during receipt of file %s: computed 0x%x, read 0x%x

event.name: FileOpenError
event.description: An error occurred opening a file

event.name: FileReceived
event.description: The File Uplink component successfully received a file

event.name: FileWriteError
event.description: An error occurred writing to a file

event.name: InvalidReceiveMode
event.description: The File Uplink component received a packet with a type that was invalid for the current receive mode

arg.name: packetType
arg.description: The type of the packet received

event.name: PacketOutOfBounds
event.description: During receipt of a file, the File Uplink component encountered a packet with offset and size out of bounds for the current file
event.format_string: Packet %u out of bounds for file %s

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the packet

event.name: PacketOutOfOrder
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered an out-of-order packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

arg.name: lastPacketIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the last packet received before the out-of-order packet

event.name: PacketDuplicate
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered a duplicate packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the duplicate packet

event.name: UplinkCanceled
event.description: The File Uplink component received a CANCEL packet

event.name: DecodeError
event.description: Error decoding file packet
event.format_string: Unable to decode file packet. Status: %d

arg.name: status
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

event.name: SEVERITY_FILTER_STATE
event.description: Dump severity filter state

event.name: ID_FILTER_ENABLED
event.description: Indicate ID is filtered

event.name: ID_FILTER_LIST_FULL
event.description: Attempted to add ID to full ID filter ID
event.format_string: ID filter list is full. Cannot filter %u .

event.name: ID_FILTER_REMOVED
event.description: Removed an ID from the filter

event.name: ID_FILTER_NOT_FOUND
event.description: ID not in filter

event.name: PrmIdNotFound
event.description: Parameter ID not found in database.

event.name: PrmIdUpdated
event.description: Parameter ID updated in database

event.name: PrmDbFull
event.description: Parameter database is full
event.format_string: Parameter DB full when adding ID 0x%x

event.name: PrmIdAdded
event.description: Parameter ID added to database

event.name: PrmFileWriteError
event.description: Failed to write parameter file
event.format_string: Parameter write failed in stage %s with record %d and error %d

arg.name: record
arg.description: The record that had the failure

event.name: PrmFileSaveComplete
event.description: Save of parameter file completed
event.format_string: Parameter file save completed. Wrote %u records.

event.name: PrmFileReadError
event.description: Failed to read parameter file
event.format_string: Parameter file read failed in stage %s with record %d and error %d

arg.name: record
arg.description: The record that had the failure

event.name: PrmFileLoadComplete
event.description: Load of parameter file completed
event.format_string: Parameter file load completed. Read %u records.

event.name: HLTH_PING_WARN
event.description: Warn that a ping target is longer than the warning value

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_LATE
event.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_WRONG_KEY
event.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding
event.format_string: Ping entry %s responded with wrong key 0x%x

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_ENABLE
event.description: Report checking turned on or off

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_PING
event.description: Report a particular entry on or off

arg.name: enabled
arg.description: If health pinging is enabled for a particular entry

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_CHECK_LOOKUP_ERROR
event.description: Entry was not found

arg.name: entry
arg.description: The entry passing the warning level

event.name: HLTH_PING_UPDATED
event.description: Report changed ping
event.format_string: Health ping for %s changed to WARN %u FATAL %u

event.name: HLTH_PING_INVALID_VALUES
event.description: Report changed ping
event.format_string: Health ping for %s invalid values: WARN %u FATAL %u

event.name: AF_ASSERT_0
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_1
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_2
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_3
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_4
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_5
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_ASSERT_6
event.description: An assert happened

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: AF_UNEXPECTED_ASSERT
event.description: An unexpected assert happened
event.format_string: Unexpected assert in file %s, line %u, args %u

arg.name: file
arg.description: The source file of the assert

event.name: NoBuffsAvailable
event.description: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

event.name: NullEmptyBuffer
event.description: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation
event.format_string: Received null pointer and zero size buffer

event.name: QueueOverflow
event.description: Queue overflow event

event.name: BadChecksum
event.description: During receipt of a file, the computed checksum value did not match the stored value
event.format_string: Bad checksum value during receipt of file %s: computed 0x%x, read 0x%x

event.name: FileOpenError
event.description: An error occurred opening a file

event.name: FileReceived
event.description: The File Uplink component successfully received a file

event.name: FileWriteError
event.description: An error occurred writing to a file

event.name: InvalidReceiveMode
event.description: The File Uplink component received a packet with a type that was invalid for the current receive mode

arg.name: packetType
arg.description: The type of the packet received

event.name: PacketOutOfBounds
event.description: During receipt of a file, the File Uplink component encountered a packet with offset and size out of bounds for the current file
event.format_string: Packet %u out of bounds for file %s

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the packet

event.name: PacketOutOfOrder
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered an out-of-order packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

arg.name: lastPacketIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the last packet received before the out-of-order packet

event.name: PacketDuplicate
event.description: The File Uplink component encountered a duplicate packet during file receipt

arg.name: packetIndex
arg.description: The sequence index of the duplicate packet

event.name: UplinkCanceled
event.description: The File Uplink component received a CANCEL packet

event.name: DecodeError
event.description: Error decoding file packet
event.format_string: Unable to decode file packet. Status: %d

arg.name: status
arg.description: The sequence index of the out-of-order packet

event.name: WatchdogState
event.description: event that updates everytime watchdog is pet

event.name: I2cReadFailed
event.description: Event for failed INA260 read
event.format_string: INA260 I2C read failed for register 0x%u with status %d

event.name: SensorReadComplete
event.format_string: INA260 read complete: current %g mA, voltage %g mV, power %g mW

event.name: gpioOn
event.description: event to report the state of the gpio

event.name: POWER_MODE_REQUESTED
event.description: Event indicating a power mode change was requested

event.name: POWER_MODE_RECEIVED
event.description: Event indicating the current power mode was received

arg.name: mode
arg.description: The current power mode reported by Jetson

event.name: JETSON_POWER_STATE_REQUESTED
event.description: Event indicating a Jetson power state change was requested
event.format_string: JetsonManager requested Jetson power state change to %s

event.name: JETSON_POWER_STATE_RECEIVED
event.description: Event indicating the current Jetson power state was received

arg.name: jetsonState
arg.description: The current Jetson power state reported by Jetson

event.name: JETSON_POWER_STATE_TIMEOUT
event.description: Event indicating a Jetson power commmand timed out
event.format_string: JetsonManager timed out waiting for Jetson power state response to command %s

arg.name: jetsonState
arg.description: The Jetson power state that timed out

event.name: OpenPinError
event.format_string: Failed to open GPIO chip %s pin %u [%s]: %s

event.name: InterruptReadError
event.format_string: Interrupt data read expected %u byes and got %u

event.name: OpenPinError
event.format_string: Failed to open GPIO chip %s pin %u [%s]: %s

event.name: InterruptReadError
event.format_string: Interrupt data read expected %u byes and got %u

event.name: OpenPinError
event.format_string: Failed to open GPIO chip %s pin %u [%s]: %s

event.name: InterruptReadError
event.format_string: Interrupt data read expected %u byes and got %u

channel.name: WatchdogPet
channel.description: telemetry channel to report the state of the watchdog

channel.name: CurrentJetsonPowerState
channel.description: Current power state of the Jetson

channel.name: jetson_cpu_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson CPU temp data

channel.name: jetson_gpu_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson GPU temp data

channel.name: jetson_cv0_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson CV0 temp data

channel.name: jetson_cv1_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson CV1 temp data

channel.name: jetson_cv2_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson CV2 temp data

channel.name: jetson_soc0_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson SOC0 temp data

channel.name: jetson_soc1_temp_read
channel.description: telemetry channel for Jetson SOC1 temp data

channel.name: JETSON_IDLE_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for IDLE state low threshold

channel.name: JETSON_IDLE_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for IDLE state high threshold

channel.name: JETSON_WARN_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for WARNING state low threshold

channel.name: JETSON_WARN_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for WARNING state high threshold

channel.name: JETSON_FAULT_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for FAULT state low threshold

channel.name: JETSON_FAULT_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for FAULT state high threshold

channel.name: CS_LoadCommands
channel.description: The number of Load commands executed

channel.name: CS_CancelCommands
channel.description: The number of Cancel commands executed

channel.name: CS_Errors
channel.description: The number of errors that have occurred

channel.name: CS_CommandsExecuted
channel.description: The number of commands executed across all sequences.

channel.name: comQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

channel.name: buffQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

channel.name: FilesSent
channel.description: The total number of files sent

channel.name: PacketsSent
channel.description: The total number of packets sent

channel.name: CommandsExecuted
channel.description: The total number of commands successfully executed

channel.name: FilesReceived
channel.description: The total number of complete files received

channel.name: PacketsReceived
channel.description: The total number of packets received

channel.name: Warnings
channel.description: The total number of warnings issued

channel.name: CurrBuffs
channel.description: The current number of allocated buffers

channel.name: HiBuffs
channel.description: The high water mark of allocated buffers

channel.name: NoBuffs
channel.description: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

channel.name: EmptyBuffs
channel.description: The number of empty buffers returned

channel.name: comQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

channel.name: buffQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

channel.name: CS_LoadCommands
channel.description: The number of Load commands executed

channel.name: CS_CancelCommands
channel.description: The number of Cancel commands executed

channel.name: CS_Errors
channel.description: The number of errors that have occurred

channel.name: CS_CommandsExecuted
channel.description: The number of commands executed across all sequences.

channel.name: comQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

channel.name: buffQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

channel.name: FilesSent
channel.description: The total number of files sent

channel.name: PacketsSent
channel.description: The total number of packets sent

channel.name: CommandsExecuted
channel.description: The total number of commands successfully executed

channel.name: FilesReceived
channel.description: The total number of complete files received

channel.name: PacketsReceived
channel.description: The total number of packets received

channel.name: Warnings
channel.description: The total number of warnings issued

channel.name: CurrBuffs
channel.description: The current number of allocated buffers

channel.name: HiBuffs
channel.description: The high water mark of allocated buffers

channel.name: NoBuffs
channel.description: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

channel.name: EmptyBuffs
channel.description: The number of empty buffers returned

channel.name: comQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

channel.name: buffQueueDepth
channel.description: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

channel.name: FilesReceived
channel.description: The total number of complete files received

channel.name: PacketsReceived
channel.description: The total number of packets received

channel.name: Warnings
channel.description: The total number of warnings issued

channel.name: WatchdogPet
channel.description: telemetry channel to report the state of the watchdog

channel.name: imx_thermal_state
channel.description: telemetry channel for imx thermal state

channel.name: INA260_Jetson
channel.description: Telemetry channel for INA260 Jetson subsystem using struct PowerReading

channel.name: INA260_OBC
channel.description: Telemetry channel for INA260 OBC subsystem using struct PowerReading

channel.name: INA260_Peripheral
channel.description: Telemetry channel for INA260 Peripheral subsystem using struct PowerReading

channel.name: PERIPHERAL_TEMP
channel.description: Telemetry to log periferal temp data

channel.name: JETSON_TEMP
channel.description: Telemetry to log Jetson temp data

channel.name: MCP_IDLE_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for IDLE state low threshold

channel.name: MCP_IDLE_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for IDLE state high threshold

channel.name: MCP_WARN_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for WARNING state low threshold

channel.name: MCP_WARN_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for WARNING state high threshold

channel.name: MCP_FAULT_LOW
channel.description: Telmetry for FAULT state low threshold

channel.name: MCP_FAULT_HIGH
channel.description: Telmetry for FAULT state high threshold

channel.name: gpioState
channel.description: telemetry channel to report the state of the GPIO

channel.name: JetsonPowerMode
channel.description: Current power mode of the Jetson as reported by JetsonPowerModeManager

channel.name: JetsonPowerState
channel.description: Current power state of the Jetson
